Operation 'findOrCreateDataset' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details, missing_side_effects. Description lacks clarity about return value and idempotent behavior. Added explicit information about what is returned and clarified the conditional behavior (create vs. return existing) to help AI agents understand the operation's side effects and when to use it.

data.current_summary: Find or create a new dataset
data.current_description: Creates a new dataset or returns an existing one with the specified ID. The request body defines the schema of the dataset including field names and types.
data.description_suggestion: Creates a new dataset or returns an existing one with the specified ID. The request body defines the dataset schema including field names and types. Returns the dataset definition with its ID and field configuration. If a dataset with the specified ID already exists, it is returned unchanged; if it does not exist, a new dataset is created with the provided schema.
data.reasoning: Description lacks clarity about return value and idempotent behavior. Added explicit information about what is returned and clarified the conditional behavior (create vs. return existing) to help AI agents understand the operation's side effects and when to use it.

message: Operation 'appendDataToDataset' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description is mostly clear but lacks explicit information about the expected request format and return value. Added reference to DataPayload schema and clarified that the response includes the complete updated dataset to improve AI agent understanding of inputs and outputs.

data.current_description: Appends one or more rows of data to an existing dataset. Data is added to the existing records without removing any.
data.description_suggestion: Appends one or more rows of data to an existing dataset. Data is added to the existing records without removing any. Expects a DataPayload containing the rows to append. Returns the updated dataset with all records including the newly appended rows.
data.reasoning: Description is mostly clear but lacks explicit information about the expected request format and return value. Added reference to DataPayload schema and clarified that the response includes the complete updated dataset to improve AI agent understanding of inputs and outputs.

message: Operation 'replaceDataInDataset' has semantic quality issues: missing_output_details. Description clearly explains the destructive nature but lacks explicit information about request format and return value. Added reference to DataPayload schema, clarified the response content, and emphasized the irreversible nature to help AI agents understand the operation's significance and consequences.

data.current_summary: Replace all data in a dataset
data.current_description: Replaces all existing data in a dataset with the provided data. All previous records are removed and the new data is inserted.
data.description_suggestion: Replaces all existing data in a dataset with the provided data. All previous records are removed and the new data is inserted. Expects a DataPayload containing the new rows. Returns the updated dataset with only the newly inserted records. This operation is destructive and cannot be undone.
data.reasoning: Description clearly explains the destructive nature but lacks explicit information about request format and return value. Added reference to DataPayload schema, clarified the response content, and emphasized the irreversible nature to help AI agents understand the operation's significance and consequences.
